initial_draft:

```
<my resources> X: 5, Y: 25 </my resources>
<my goals> Acquire as many resources as possible </my goals>
<reason> Player RED is offering 12 X for 6 Y. I have 5 X and 25 Y. This is a potentially good trade, as I can get a significant amount of X without losing too much Y. I have 25 Y, and I'm giving 6, so I will have 19 Y. I have 5 X, and I will receive 12, so I will have 17 X. This seems like a good deal. Since this is the last round, I should accept. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message> Accepting the trade. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
```
